title: Challenge a source respectfully
subtitle: Question without dismissing.
overview: Module: Deep Native Input. B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex topics, and C1 readiness.

sections.title: B2 hi focus
rows: Respectful challenge shows independence without arrogance.
尊重地质疑显示独立性，而不是傲慢。
B2 Hi frame: identify stance, map structure, notice implication, extract style, and produce an independent response.
B2 Hi 框架：识别立场、梳理结构、注意含义、提取风格，并产出独立回应。
I find the source useful, but I would question whether its advice works for learners who feel anxious about speaking. They may need more emotional support before output becomes productive.
我觉得这个来源有用，但我会质疑它的建议是否适用于对开口感到焦虑的学习者。他们可能需要更多情绪支持，输出才会有效。

items.en: Respectful challenge shows independence without arrogance.
items.zh: 尊重地质疑显示独立性，而不是傲慢。

items.en: B2 Hi frame: identify stance, map structure, notice implication, extract style, and produce an independent response.
items.zh: B2 Hi 框架：识别立场、梳理结构、注意含义、提取风格，并产出独立回应。

items.en: I find the source useful, but I would question whether its advice works for learners who feel anxious about speaking. They may need more emotional support before output becomes productive.
items.zh: 我觉得这个来源有用，但我会质疑它的建议是否适用于对开口感到焦虑的学习者。他们可能需要更多情绪支持，输出才会有效。

items.en: I will make the answer independent, not just correct.
items.zh: 我会让回答独立，而不只是正确。

items.en: A high B2 answer should show structure, judgment, tone control, and real examples.
items.zh: 高 B2 回答应该显示结构、判断力、语气控制和真实例子。

items.en: If my idea is complex, I will guide the listener with clear transitions.
items.zh: 如果我的想法复杂，我会用清楚转场引导听者。

items.en: I can revise for precision without making the language heavy.
items.zh: 我可以为了准确而修改，同时不让语言变沉重。

items.en: This lesson should help me speak and write with more authority and more humility.
items.zh: 这节课应该帮助我更有权威感也更谦逊地说和写。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I find the source useful, but I would question whether its advice works for learners who feel anxious about speaking. They may need more emotional support before output becomes productive.
lines.zh: 我觉得这个来源有用，但我会质疑它的建议是否适用于对开口感到焦虑的学习者。他们可能需要更多情绪支持，输出才会有效。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more independent and better structured?
lines.zh: 你能让这个回应更独立、结构更好吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the issue, add depth, address a complication, and close with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义问题、加入深度、处理复杂点，并用实际影响收尾。

items.en: Answer once in seven or eight sentences with clear transitions.
items.zh: 用七到八句话回答一次，并使用清楚转场。

items.en: Add one high-B2 move: define a term, answer an objection, or qualify the conclusion.
items.zh: 加入一个高 B2 动作：定义术语、回应反对意见或限定结论。

items.en: Record the answer and revise one sentence for precision and natural rhythm.
items.zh: 录下回答，并修改一句话，让它更准确、节奏更自然。

items.en: Keep the revised version as a model for future C1 Bridge practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的版本保留为未来 C1 Bridge 练习的模型。
